title: alp-sdk-community contribution metadata (v1)
description: Per-contribution metadata.yaml schema for chips and libraries hosted in the alplabai/alp-sdk-community repo (Tier 2).  alp-sdk's CI (pr-metadata-validate) checks every touched contribution's metadata.yaml against this schema before allowing merge.  Tier 1 (in-tree alp-sdk chips) is governed by metadata/schemas/board-config-v1.schema.json instead.

schema_version.description: Schema version this metadata.yaml is written against.  Currently 1.

name.description: Filesystem directory name under chips/ or libraries/ in alp-sdk-community.  Lower-case, snake-case, ASCII only.  Must match the parent directory name exactly.

kind.description: What kind of contribution this is.  Determines which directory (chips/ vs libraries/) the entry lives under.

family.description: High-level family the contribution belongs to.  Drives filtering in registry.yaml + the eventual web index.

interfaces.description: Buses / interfaces the contribution drives.  Customers filter by this when searching for chips that fit their carrier.

repo.description: Other repo this contribution depends on (e.g. 'alp-sdk').

version.description: Minimum compatible version (SemVer range or exact tag).

dependencies.description: Repos this contribution needs to compile against.  At minimum, every contribution declares a >= alp-sdk version it works with.

license.description: Permissive open-source license under which the contribution is distributed.  GPL family and proprietary licenses are rejected by pr-lint.

author.description: GitHub @handle of the primary author.  Auto-becomes the contribution's CODEOWNER under alp-sdk-community/.github/CODEOWNERS.

abi_version.description: Per-contribution ABI version.  Bumps when public-header symbols change in a breaking way.

verification.description: Verification status badge.  `untested` = compiles + smoke tests only; `verified` = at least one HiL silicon bring-up; `regression` = at least one shipping product uses the contribution.

description.description: Short customer-facing description; rendered in the registry index.

upstream_status.description: Provenance of the contribution -- helps customers gauge maturity.
